Airport Weather Warning
National Weather Service State College PA
353 PM EDT Wed Mar 11 2026

...AIRPORT WEATHER WARNING...

The National Weather Service in State College PA has issued an 

* Airport Weather Warning for...
  State College Regional Airport (UNV).

* Valid until 430 PM EDT or when cancelled. 

* Cloud to ground lightning is expected within 5 mi of the airport.

A Tornado Watch remains in effect until 800 PM EDT for central
Pennsylvania.
